title: Ambar Gorgon
subtitle: design and development
banner: Programming Technician with 3+ years of development experience. Specialized in FrontEnd solutions and engaging designs.
job1-title: FrontEnd Development in Mobile App - EstoyAcá
job1-description: Responsible for supporting the design and developing a React Native application that connects workers and clients through geolocation.
job2-title: Accessible Gastronomic Menu Development - Chimi Deli
job2-description: Designed and developed a menu focused on accessibility for people with disabilities. Prototyped in Figma and built with React.
job3-description: Enhanced understanding and usability of Smart Contracts in JavaScript through translation and technical documentation, collaborating in an agile SCRUM team.
project1-description: FrontEnd development of a cross-platform application that connects workers with service requesters for household tasks. Integrated geolocation and WebSocket messaging.
project2-description: Design and development of an accessible restaurant menu for people with disabilities, focusing on usability and user experience.
project3-title: El Buen Sabor - Ecommerce & Restaurant Manager
project3-description: FrontEnd development in Next.js for an internal management system and eCommerce of a fictional restaurant, including documentation and integration with a Spring Boot backend.
project4-description: Brand design and development of a fictional clothing store with Firebase storage and hosting on Vercel.
about-me-text:
Hi 👋, I’m <1>Ambar Gorgon</1>, a Programming Technician and FrontEnd Developer. 

I’m passionate about creating engaging and functional interfaces, and I also have experience working with backends and databases, which allows me to understand projects from an integral perspective. In addition, thanks to my training, I can document and plan each stage while always seeking the most efficient path. 

I believe every idea deserves a tailor-made solution, which is why I enjoy listening, collaborating, and finding the best way to turn it into a unique digital experience. 🚀 

If you have a project in mind, I’d love to chat and think about how to bring it to life!
